description: A production-ready modern Coffee Shop mobile app (home + ordering flow) with mock state, SafeArea root + AutoLayout/Flex, SOLID components (HomeScreen, CategoryChip, ProductCard, SpecialsCarousel, CartSummary, BottomNavBar), and a warm cozy UI (beige/coffee tones, gentle shadows, clean typography).

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready modern Coffee Shop mobile app (home + ordering flow) with:
- mock state
- SafeArea root + AutoLayout/Flex only (no absolute positioning)
- SOLID components (HomeScreen, CategoryChip, ProductCard, SpecialsCarousel, CartSummary, BottomNavBar)
- warm cozy UI (beige/coffee tones, gentle shadows, clean typography)

Home screen:
- hero image/carousel with primary "Order Now" CTA
- Today's Specials (horizontal scrolling cards)
- category chips for filtering
- featured products (image, name, description, price, +Add button)
- rich empty cart state

Navigation:
- bottom nav (Home, Menu, Orders, Cart/Profile)
- functional Menu screen with category filter
- Cart screen (line items, quantity controls, total, Place Order)

Include:
- full working code
- navigation
- mock state
- reusable components
- seeded sample items (Latte, Cappuccino, Croissant, Iced Matcha)
Here's your **BrewHouse** app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add a new page with navigation

I've created a complete Uno Platform app at app/BrewHouse/BrewHouse.csproj.

**Key files:**
- app/BrewHouse/App.xaml
- app/BrewHouse/App.xaml.cs
- app/BrewHouse/BrewHouse.csproj
- app/BrewHouse/GlobalUsings.cs
- app/BrewHouse/Models/AppConfig.cs

- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/CartPage.xaml

- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/HomePage.xaml
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/HomePage.xaml.cs
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/MainModel.cs
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/MainPage.xaml
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/MainPage.xaml.cs
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/MenuPage.xaml
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/MenuPage.xaml.cs
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/OrdersPage.xaml
- app/BrewHouse/Presentation/OrdersPage.xaml.cs

The app is built and running. The user may ask me to modify it.
